mapper.insert: insert into tbl_video_recoding (id, meeting_id, recoding_time) values (#{id}, #{meetingId}, #{recodingTime})
mapper.select: select id, original_name, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, created_datetime, recoding_time, meeting_id, requester_id, acceptor_id from vw_file_recoding where (requester_id = #{memberId} or acceptor_id = #{memberId}) and (requester_id = #{opponentId} or acceptor_id = #{opponentId})
select id, original_name, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, created_datetime, meeting_id, recoding_time from vw_file_recoding where meeting_id = #{meetingId}
